# admove

# Overview

*admove* is a new R package for tagging-based movement modelling,
developed to estimate fine-scale animal movement patterns from a range
of tagging data, including mark-recapture, mark-resight, and
data-logging (archival) tags. The underlying movement model is based on
the advection-diffusion equation and can incorporate habitat preference
functions, allowing the reconstruction of individual movement paths as
well as inference on population-level movement dynamics from a
relatively small set of interpretable parameters. Movement rates can be
modelled as a function of environmental conditions or geographic
location.

The current version of the package supports estimation of habitat
preference functions and movement patterns. Future development will
extend this framework to include spatiotemporally varying recapture
probability, natural and fishing mortality, as well as relative biomass
indices and spatial distributions.

To get started with *admove*, install and load the package, simulate a
tagging dataset, and fit the movement model:

``` r

## install required packages
install.packages("remotes")

## install admove from local source
remotes::install_github("tokami/admove")

## Load admove
library(admove)

## Simulate a small tagging data set
sim <- sim_data()

## Fit admove to the simulated data
fit <- admove(sim)

## Plot simulated data and model predictions
plot_compare(list(sim = sim, fit = fit))
```

# More information

More detailed examples and documentation for *admove* can be found at
<https://tokami.github.io/admove/>. The *pkgdown* page includes links to
articles, vignettes, functions descriptions, information to version
updates, and much more. In case your question is not answered by the
package documentation and on the *pkgdown* pages, please write an email
to the maintainer: [Tobias
Mildenberger](mailto:t.k.mildenberger@gmail.com). In case you find bugs,
please post an issue [here](https://github.com/tokami/admove/issues).

## Citation

Please use the R command `citation("admove")` to receive information on
how to cite this package.

## Funding

The development of *admove* was cofunded by the European Union.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Co-funded by the EU
logo](reference/figures/EN_Co-fundedbytheEU_RGB_POS.png)

Co-funded by the EU logo

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_buffer()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_buffer.md)
  : Add a one-cell buffer around an admove grid

- [`add_lab()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_lab.md) :
  Add a label to a plot

- [`add_predictions()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_predictions.md)
  : Add model predictions to a fitted admove model

- [`add_report()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_report.md)
  : Add reported RTMB quantities to a fitted admove model

- [`add_sdreport()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_sdreport.md)
  : Add an RTMB sdreport to a fitted admove model

- [`add_sref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_sref.md)
  : Add or harmonise a spatial reference on an object

- [`add_tag_dist()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_tag_dist.md)
  : Compute predicted location distributions for a single tag

- [`add_tref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/add_tref.md)
  : Add or harmonize a time reference on an object

- [`st_crs.admove_grid()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/admove-st_crs.md)
  [`st_crs.admove_cov()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/admove-st_crs.md)
  [`st_crs.admove_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/admove-st_crs.md)
  : sf-compatible CRS accessor for admove objects

- [`admove()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/admove.md) :
  Fit an admove movement model

- [`bbox_grid()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/bbox_grid.md)
  : Return the bounding box of an admove grid

- [`check_conf()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/check_conf.md)
  : Check and complete a model configuration list

- [`check_cov()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/check_cov.md)
  : Check and standardise covariate data

- [`check_grid()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/check_grid.md)
  : Check or coerce an admove grid

- [`check_par()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/check_par.md)
  : Check parameter dimensions for admove

- [`check_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/check_tags.md)
  : Check and standardise a tag object

- [`combine_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/combine_tags.md)
  [`c(`*`<admove_tags>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/combine_tags.md)
  :

  Combine `admove_tags` objects

- [`create_grid()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/create_grid.md)
  : Create or modify a spatial grid for admove

- [`create_sref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/create_sref.md)
  : Spatial reference for admove objects

- [`create_tref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/create_tref.md)
  : Time reference for admove objects

- [`` `crs<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/crs-set.md)
  : Set coordinate reference system (CRS)

- [`crs()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/crs.md) : Get
  coordinate reference system (CRS)

- [`` `crs_scale<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/crs_scale-set.md)
  : Set CRS scale

- [`crs_scale()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/crs_scale.md)
  : Get CRS scale

- [`date_2_time()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/date_2_time.md)
  : Convert dates to numeric time since an origin

- [`default_conf()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/default_conf.md)
  : Default model configuration for admove

- [`default_map()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/default_map.md)
  : Default parameter map

- [`default_par()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/default_par.md)
  : Default initial parameter values for admove

- [`default_sim_funcs()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/default_sim_funcs.md)
  : Default simulation functions for admove

- [`default_sim_par()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/default_sim_par.md)
  : Default parameter values for simulation

- [`dim(`*`<admove_grid>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/dim.admove_grid.md)
  : Return dimensions

- [`.guess_crs_scale()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/dot-guess_crs_scale.md)
  : Guess a coordinate scaling factor from a spatial reference (sref)

- [`.sim_one_tag()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/dot-sim_one_tag.md)
  : Simulate a single tag track

- [`get_ctags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/get_ctags.md)
  : Extract mark-recapture tags

- [`get_dim_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/get_dim_tags.md)
  : Get spatial and temporal ranges from tagging data

- [`get_dtags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/get_dtags.md)
  : Extract data-storage tags

- [`get_neighbours()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/get_neighbours.md)
  : Get neighbouring cells of an admove grid

- [`get_stags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/get_stags.md)
  : Extract mark-resight tags

- [`logLik(`*`<admove>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/logLik.admove.md)
  : Log-likelihood of a fitted admove model

- [`make_x_y_cov()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/make_x_y_cov.md)
  : Create x- and y-coordinate covariate fields

- [`model_version_info()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/model_version_info.md)
  : Description of model

- [`montagus_harrier`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/montagus_harrier.md)
  : Montagu's harrier

- [`nll()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/nll.md) : Negative
  log-likelihood for the admove model

- [`` `origin<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/origin-set.md)
  : Set temporal origin

- [`origin()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/origin.md) :
  Get temporal origin

- [`` `period<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/period-set.md)
  : Set temporal period

- [`period()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/period.md) :
  Get temporal period

- [`plot_compare()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_compare.md)
  : Compare fitted and simulated admove objects

- [`plot_compare_one()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_compare_one.md)
  : Compare a single quantity across fitted or simulated admove objects

- [`plot_cov()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_cov.md)
  [`plot(`*`<admove_cov>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_cov.md)
  : Plot covariate fields

- [`plot_data()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_data.md)
  [`plot(`*`<admove_data>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_data.md)
  :

  Plot components of an `admove_data` object

- [`plot_diffusion()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_diffusion.md)
  : Plot diffusion on a spatial grid

- [`plot_fit()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_fit.md)
  [`plot(`*`<admove>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_fit.md)
  :

  Summary plots for a fitted `admove` object

- [`plot_grid()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_grid.md)
  [`plot(`*`<admove_grid>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_grid.md)
  : Plot an admove grid

- [`plot_land()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_land.md)
  : Plot land masses in the current plotting region

- [`plot_pref_func()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_pref_func.md)
  : Plot habitat preference functions

- [`plot_pref_grid()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_pref_grid.md)
  : Plot spatial habitat preference surfaces

- [`plot_sim()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_sim.md)
  [`plot(`*`<admove_sim>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_sim.md)
  : Plot a summary of simulated admove data

- [`plot_tag_dist()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_tag_dist.md)
  : Plot predicted location distributions for a single tag

- [`plot_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_tags.md)
  [`plot(`*`<admove_tags>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_tags.md)
  : Plot tagging data

- [`plot_taxis()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/plot_taxis.md)
  : Plot taxis on a spatial grid

- [`prep_cov()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/prep_cov.md)
  : Prepare covariate fields for admove

- [`prep_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/prep_tags.md)
  [`prep_dtags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/prep_tags.md)
  [`prep_stags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/prep_tags.md)
  [`prep_ctags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/prep_tags.md)
  : Prepare tagging data for admove

- [`print(`*`<admove_cov>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/print-admove.md)
  [`print(`*`<admove_data>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/print-admove.md)
  [`print(`*`<admove>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/print-admove.md)
  [`print(`*`<admove_grid>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/print-admove.md)
  [`print(`*`<admove_tags>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/print-admove.md)
  : Print admove objects

- [`scale_sref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/scale_sref.md)
  : Change coordinate units by scaling an admove object

- [`scale_tref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/scale_tref.md)
  : Change time units by scaling an admove object

- [`setup_data()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/setup_data.md)
  : Set up input data for an admove model

- [`shift_tref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/shift_tref.md)
  : Shift the origin of a time reference while preserving represented
  dates

- [`sim_cov()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/sim_cov.md) :
  Simulate covariate fields

- [`sim_data()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/sim_data.md)
  : Simulate a complete admove data set

- [`sim_release_events()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/sim_release_events.md)
  : Simulate release events

- [`sim_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/sim_tags.md)
  : Simulate tagging data

- [`skjepo`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/skjepo.md) :
  Skipjack tuna in the Eastern Pacific Ocean

- [`` `sref<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/sref-set.md)
  : Set spatial reference on an object

- [`sref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/sref.md) : Get
  spatial reference from an object

- [`` `[`( ``*`<admove_cov>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/subset-admove_cov.md)
  :

  Subset an `admove_cov` object

- [`summarise_cov()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_cov.md)
  [`summary(`*`<admove_cov>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_cov.md)
  : Summarise covariate fields

- [`summarise_data()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_data.md)
  [`summary(`*`<admove_data>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_data.md)
  : Summarise admove data

- [`summarise_fit()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_fit.md)
  [`summary(`*`<admove>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_fit.md)
  : Summarise a fitted admove model

- [`summarise_grid()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_grid.md)
  [`summary(`*`<admove_grid>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_grid.md)
  : Summarise an admove grid

- [`summarise_tags()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_tags.md)
  [`summary(`*`<admove_tags>`*`)`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/summarise_tags.md)
  : Summarise tagging data

- [`transform_sref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/transform_sref.md)
  : Transform stored coordinates to a new CRS while preserving locations

- [`` `tref<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/tref-set.md)
  : Set time reference on an object

- [`tref()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/tref.md) : Get
  time reference from an object

- [`tref_equal()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/tref_equal.md)
  : Compare two time references for equality

- [`` `units_space<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/units_space-set.md)
  : Set spatial units

- [`units_space()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/units_space.md)
  : Get spatial units

- [`` `units_time<-`() ``](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/units_time-set.md)
  : Set temporal units

- [`units_time()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/units_time.md)
  : Get temporal units

- [`use_release_events()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/use_release_events.md)
  : Group tags by release events

- [`x_centers()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/x_centers.md)
  : Get x-coordinates of grid-cell centres

- [`y_centers()`](https://tokami.github.io/admove/reference/y_centers.md)
  : Get y-coordinates of grid-cell centres

# Articles

### Getting started

- [Fine-scale movement modeling based on tagging
  data](https://tokami.github.io/admove/articles/tutorial.md):
- [Preparing tagging data for
  admove](https://tokami.github.io/admove/articles/preparing-tags.md):
- [Preparing covariates for
  admove](https://tokami.github.io/admove/articles/preparing-covariates.md):
- [Spatial grids for
  admove](https://tokami.github.io/admove/articles/spatial-grids.md):

### Simulation

- [Simulating tagging
  data](https://tokami.github.io/admove/articles/simulation.md):
